content: Phase 1: POC - Setup PostgreSQL with TimescaleDB in Docker
Phase 1: POC - Create climate data ingestion script using pyam + NGFS API
Phase 1: POC - Build risk calculation engine with 3 methodologies (risk multipliers, PD adjustments, Expected Loss)
Phase 1: POC - Test all POC scripts and verify outputs
Phase 1: POC - All user stories covered and tested
Phase 2: Install all backend dependencies (FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, TimescaleDB, pyam, etc.)
Phase 2: Install all frontend dependencies (React, TypeScript, Tailwind, Recharts)
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design agent
Phase 2: Create backend database models and schemas
Phase 2: Build backend API endpoints (portfolios, assets, scenario analysis)
Phase 2: Build frontend UI with all pages and components
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development and testing
Phase 3: Implement JWT authentication (registration, login, token refresh)
Phase 3: Add multi-user isolation and row-level permissions
